hooks.command: changed=$( { git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null; git diff --name-only --cached 2>/dev/null; git log --diff-filter=ACMR --name-only --pretty=format: --since="4 hours ago" 2>/dev/null; } | sort -u | wc -l | tr -d ' '); if [ "$changed" -gt 3 ]; then echo "💡 Session touched $changed files — consider /harness retro to capture learnings"; fi
